name: statecrafting
description: Build harness for the @statecrafting packages (spec 002). Private and never published: it exists to cargo-build the vendored Encore core out of vendor/encore and link the results into the per-platform toolchain packages. The shipped artifacts are the packages under packages/.

scripts.build:runtime: ENCORE_VERSION=v1.57.9 cargo build --release --manifest-path vendor/encore/Cargo.toml -p encore-js-runtime -p encore-tsparser && node packages/toolchain/scripts/link-runtime.mjs

statecrafting.//: The license tier of every governed package here, enforced by scripts/check-licenses.mjs (spec 005 section 3.3). Spec 001 section 3 splits these by customer reach: packages a stamped app touches stay unencumbered, control-plane internals keep the AGPL shield, and vendored upstream keeps its own license. The three toolchain platform packages are MPL-2.0 because they carry the vendored Encore binaries; the meta package that depends on them is Apache-2.0. No customer-reaching package may depend on an AGPL-3.0 one (spec 001 section 3.2). A package absent from this map fails the check; it does not pass silently.
